product_overview: Kwanza Stream is a live-streaming and community platform targeted at Angolan users that provides account-based authentication, profile/onboarding, avatar upload, discovery, chat, virtual currency (Salos), creator tools and admin controls. The backend exposes REST endpoints for auth, user management and media upload, with real-time features (Socket.io) for chat and streaming.
core_goals: Secure, resilient authentication with JWT + refresh tokens, rate-limiting and password reset flows.
Fast, safe onboarding and profile management (username validation, avatar upload with MIME/size checks).
Reliable discovery and low-latency chat for live streams with proper rate limiting and XSS protections.
Monetization via Salos with accurate balance updates and transaction history (20% platform commission).
Creator tooling (stream key management, studio access) and admin controls for user moderation.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Register, login, refresh tokens, logout, password reset, OTP/Google OAuth and protected profile access.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with {email, phone, username, password} -> Receive 201 { success, user } -> POST /api/auth/login with {identifier, password} -> Receive 200 { success, user } with JWT in httpOnly cookie -> GET /api/auth/me with cookie -> Receive 200 { user }
POST /api/auth/register with existing email -> Receive 400 Validation or duplicate user (error message PT-AO) -> POST /api/auth/login with wrong password -> Receive 401 Invalid credentials

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with refresh token set in httpOnly cookie -> POST /api/auth/refresh with cookie -> Receive 200 { success } -> POST /api/auth/logout with cookie -> Receive 200 { success }
POST /api/auth/refresh with expired/invalid refresh -> Receive 401 Invalid refresh -> GET /api/auth/me without valid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/auth/request-password-reset with {email} -> Receive 200 generic success message -> POST /api/auth/reset-password with {token, newPassword} -> Receive 200 Success
POST /api/auth/reset-password with invalid/expired token -> Receive 401 or 400 error

features.name: User profile and onboarding
features.description: Complete onboarding (displayName, username, bio, interests), edit profile and check username availability.
user_flows: POST /api/users/onboarding with {displayName, username, bio, interests} and Authorization header -> Receive 200 { success, user } -> GET /api/auth/me with token -> Receive 200 { user } containing onboarding fields
PUT /api/users/me with Authorization header and {username, displayName, bio, avatarUrl} -> Receive 200 { user }
PUT /api/users/me with duplicate username -> Receive 400 Validation or duplicate username error (PT-AO)
GET /api/users/check-username/testuser -> Receive 200 { available: true }
GET /api/users/check-username/invalid*name -> Receive 400 invalid username characters

features.name: Avatar upload
features.description: Upload user avatar via multipart with MIME and size validation (reject non-image and >5MB).
user_flows: POST /api/upload/avatar with Authorization header and multipart file (image/jpeg, <5MB) -> Receive 200 { success, avatarUrl } -> PUT /api/users/me with Authorization header and {avatarUrl} -> Receive 200 { user } showing avatarUrl
POST /api/upload/avatar with Authorization header and multipart file (application/pdf) -> Receive 400 Invalid type or size
POST /api/upload/avatar with Authorization header and file >5MB -> Receive 400 Invalid type or size

features.name: Discovery (Streams & Search)
features.description: Browse live streams, filter by category and search for channels or VODs.
user_flows: GET /api/streams?status=live&limit=20 -> Receive 200 { streams: [...] } with live streams for home page
GET /api/streams?category=Gaming -> Receive 200 { streams: [...] } filtered by Gaming
GET /api/search?q=channelName -> Receive 200 { results: [...] } with matching channels and VODs
GET /api/search?q=nonexistent -> Receive 200 { results: [] } and UI shows 'Nenhum resultado encontrado' (PT-AO)

features.name: Chat (real-time)
features.description: Send and receive chat messages in stream rooms with rate limiting and slow mode protections.
user_flows: POST /api/streams/:streamId/chat with Authorization header and {message} -> Receive 201 { message } and message broadcast to Socket.io room
POST /api/streams/:streamId/chat with Authorization header and {message: ''} -> Receive 400 Message cannot be empty
POST /api/streams/:streamId/chat with Authorization header sending >500 chars -> Receive 400 Message too long or truncated
POST /api/streams/:streamId/chat rapidly 11 times in 5s -> Receive 429 Rate limit exceeded

features.name: Salos (virtual currency)
features.description: View wallet balance, send Salos to streamers, apply 20% platform commission and maintain transaction history.
user_flows: GET /api/wallet with Authorization header -> Receive 200 { balance, transactions: [...] }

POST /api/wallet/transfer with Authorization header and {toUserId, amount} -> Receive 200 { success, newBalance } (20% commission applied, receiver credited amount minus commission) -> GET /api/wallet/transactions with Authorization header -> Receive 200 ordered transaction list
POST /api/wallet/transfer with Authorization header and {amount} greater than balance -> Receive 400 Insufficient funds (PT-AO)
POST /api/wallet/transfer with {amount: 0} or negative -> Receive 400 Invalid amount

features.name: Creator Studio
features.description: Creator-only area for stream management: view stats, edit stream metadata, and (re)generate RTMP stream keys.
user_flows: GET /api/creator/studio with Authorization header for streamer account -> Receive 200 { stats, streams }
GET /api/creator/studio with Authorization header for normal account -> Receive 403 Forbidden
PATCH /api/creator/streams/:id with Authorization header and {title, category} -> Receive 200 { stream }
POST /api/creator/streams/:id/stream-key with Authorization header -> Receive 200 { streamKey } (regenerate) -> Use returned streamKey in RTMP client to stream

features.name: Following / Social
features.description: Follow/unfollow channels and view feed of followed channels with live-first ordering.
user_flows: POST /api/channels/:channelId/follow with Authorization header -> Receive 200 { success, followingCount } -> GET /api/feed/following with Authorization header -> Receive 200 { streams } with live streams first
POST /api/channels/:ownChannelId/follow with Authorization header (self) -> Receive 400 Cannot follow your own channel
DELETE /api/channels/:channelId/follow with Authorization header -> Receive 200 { success, followingCount }

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Admin-only endpoints for user listing, suspension and revenue reports.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/users with Authorization header from admin account -> Receive 200 { users: [...] }
GET /api/admin/users with Authorization header from normal account -> Receive 403 Forbidden
POST /api/admin/users/:userId/suspend with Authorization header and {reason, until} -> Receive 200 { success }
GET /api/admin/revenue with Authorization header and admin role -> Receive 200 { revenueReport }

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Registo, login com password, refresh token, logout, OTP, Google OAuth, reset de password

endpoints.description: Registo com email, telefone, username e password
Renovar access token via refresh token (cookie/body)
Revogar refresh token e limpar cookies
Pedido de reset de password por email

features.name: User profile and onboarding
features.description: Actualização de perfil, onboarding, verificação de username

endpoints.description: Actualizar perfil (username, displayName, bio, avatarUrl, etc.)

features.name: Avatar upload
features.description: Upload de avatar com validação MIME e tamanho

endpoints.description: Multipart upload de imagem de perfil

known_limitations.issue: Rate limit auth custom keyGenerator must use ipKeyGenerator for IPv6 (addressed in index.ts)
RTMP node-media-server may throw unhandled rejection on some Node versions
known_limitations.impact: Log noise; API may still listen
